title: Revert "Travis: use go 1.12.x"
body:
This reverts commit d6270f4691e6f83179ebefe445a199ee756fe159.

Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>

comments.body: Not that commit d6270f4 had any impact, but I still prefer to clean it up.

(Guessing that this is because the CI builds run in container, so what Travis install does not matter — in the future, it would be nice to always have documented a “why is this needed” and “how it works”, even for one-liners. I appreciate that sometimes the time to do that may be lacking.)
